flavorText: Shadow monks blend stealth, mobility, and battlefield misdirection into a disciplined martial path.

features.description: You learn to spend focus on stealthy tricks, darkness control, and mobility magic so the subclass feels like a true infiltrator instead of only an unarmed striker.
As a bonus action, you move between patches of dim light or darkness, letting you reposition hard and threaten angles other characters cannot safely take.
When the light is in your favor, you can vanish from sight and break enemy targeting lines before striking from a safer position.
When another creature leaves an opening, you answer instantly with a punishing reaction attack, rewarding team coordination and battlefield awareness.

shadow-shadow-arts.name: Shadow Arts
shadow-shadow-arts.summary: Spend focus on stealth, darkness, and infiltration tricks that make the monk feel like a true shadow operative.
shadow-shadow-arts.description:
You learn to spend focus on stealthy tricks, darkness control, and mobility magic so the subclass feels like a true infiltrator instead of only an unarmed striker.

Shadow Arts is the opening identity statement for the Way of Shadow. It matters because it gives the monk non-standard tools for map access, stealth setups, and disappearing from obvious lines.

The sheet should make the specialization identity obvious, not bury it as a hidden unlock.

shadow-shadow-step.name: Shadow Step
shadow-shadow-step.summary: Teleport through dim light or darkness so your positioning becomes a weapon in its own right.
shadow-shadow-step.description:
As a bonus action, you move between patches of dim light or darkness, letting you reposition hard and threaten angles other characters cannot safely take.

Shadow Step is one of the subclass’s biggest tactical spikes. It should feel like a premium ambush and escape button rather than a tiny mobility note.

The sheet should make the specialization identity obvious, not bury it as a hidden unlock.

shadow-cloak-of-shadows.name: Cloak of Shadows
shadow-cloak-of-shadows.summary: Slip out of sight through shadow, trickery, or disciplined stillness when visibility itself is the problem.
shadow-cloak-of-shadows.description:
When the light is in your favor, you can vanish from sight and break enemy targeting lines before striking from a safer position.

Cloak of Shadows is about vanishing at the right moment to break targeting, reposition, or set up a better next turn. The exact expression depends on the subclass, but it should always feel like a real stealth-state button.

The sheet should make the specialization identity obvious, not bury it as a hidden unlock.
shadow-cloak-of-shadows.trigger: When the light is in your favor

shadow-opportunist.name: Opportunist
shadow-opportunist.summary: When another creature creates an opening, you strike immediately and punish the lapse.
shadow-opportunist.description:
When another creature leaves an opening, you answer instantly with a punishing reaction attack, rewarding team coordination and battlefield awareness.

Opportunist rewards attention and team sequencing. It should appear as a real reaction option so the player can capitalize on ally-created openings.

The sheet should make the specialization identity obvious, not bury it as a hidden unlock.
shadow-opportunist.trigger: When another creature leaves an opening
